visual_description: Two men in dark suits walk side by side on a wet nighttime street, one carrying a briefcase, their lower bodies illuminated by streetlights. The scene shifts to a parked black luxury sedan on the same wet road, where three men stand nearby, one leaning against the car and the others standing opposite each other.
audio_description: The audio is quiet with faint ambient city sounds and no clear speech.
